CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
INSERT INTO TEST_XMLS VALUES (3, XMLType('<oil-rig xml:id="14a" water="0.413"/><oil-rig xml:id="14b" water="0.402"/>'));
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/emp/empno') FROM TEST_XMLS AS e;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/po/poname') FROM TEST_XMLS AS e;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/oil-rig[@xml:id="14a"]') FROM TEST_XMLS AS e;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/nonexistingnode') FROM TEST_XMLS AS e;
CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS_NS (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/root/ns:data') FROM TEST_XMLS_NS AS e;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/root/ns:nonexistingdata') FROM TEST_XMLS_NS AS e;
CREATE TABLE TEST_XMLS_COMPLEX (I integer primary key, XMLVAL XMLType);
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/department/emp/empno') FROM TEST_XMLS_COMPLEX AS e;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/department/emp') FROM TEST_XMLS_COMPLEX AS e;
SELECT e.I, e.XMLVAL.existsNode('/company/department/emp/empname') FROM TEST_XMLS_COMPLEX AS e;
